name: Life
tagline: Heal the living, and unmake the undead.

baseAbility.name: Cure / Invigorate / Restore
baseAbility.description: Standard action, touch range. Cure (1 SP): heal 1d8 + CL damage (harmful to undead, Will half). Invigorate (free): grant temporary HP equal to CL to an injured creature for 1 hour, can't push them above their max HP. Restore (1 SP): remove a fatigued/sickened/shaken/staggered/dazzled/battered condition (or lessen a worse version of it) and heal 1d4 ability damage to one score; ongoing effects are only suppressed for CL rounds instead of removed.

talentTypes.cure: Boosts what your cure ability does when it heals someone.
talentTypes.vitality: A free rider buff (pick one per casting) you can attach whenever you use a Life ability on an ally; lasts up to 1 minute or until they take damage.

talents.name: Adrenaline Surge
talents.description: Grant an ally you heal an immediate action: attack, move, Escape Artist check, ready a weapon, or stand up.

talents.name: Affliction
talents.description: Turn restore into an offensive touch attack that fatigues/exhausts the target (Will save for the lesser effect) instead of healing an ally.

talents.name: Break Enchantment
talents.description: Restore can strip ongoing magical effects (including curses) via a magic skill check per effect instead of restoring mind/body/soul.

talents.name: Clarified Strike
talents.description: Deliver a Life ability through a weapon attack instead of a separate touch.

talents.name: Empathic Healing
talents.description: Reduce the SP cost of a healing effect by 1 by taking the removed condition/damage onto yourself instead.

talents.name: Esoteric Healing
talents.description: Life abilities stop counting as positive energy, letting them affect constructs and undead too.

talents.name: Fount of Life
talents.description: Bank rolled cure healing (up to 10 x CL) to dispense later without spending further spell points.

talents.name: Greater Healing
talents.description: Cure heals 2 HP/CL instead of 1 (repeatable up to +5 HP/CL total).

talents.name: Greater Invigorate
talents.description: Invigorate adds your casting modifier to the temp HP granted and lasts 1 hour/CL instead of 1 hour flat.

talents.name: Greater Restore
talents.description: Restore fully removes (rather than lessens) exhausted/nauseated/frightened/panicked, and also cures all ability damage and the stunned condition.

talents.name: Mass Healing
talents.description: Cure or invigorate can hit 1 extra target per 2 CL (min 1) simultaneously.

talents.name: Mass Restore
talents.description: Restore can hit 1 extra target per 2 CL (min 1) simultaneously.

talents.name: Ranged Healing
talents.description: Cure/invigorate/restore work at close range instead of requiring touch.

talents.name: Resuscitate
talents.description: Cure/invigorate can bring back a creature dead for no more than 1 round if the healing brings them above the negative-HP death threshold; they gain a temporary negative level.

talents.name: Revitalize
talents.description: Convert a cure into fast healing 1 (plus your Greater Healing count) for 1 minute/CL instead of an instant heal.

talents.name: Self-Renewal
talents.description: Use cure or restore on yourself as a swift action.

talents.name: Sudden Invigoration
talents.description: Use invigorate as an immediate action, even choosing to apply it before or after incoming damage.

cureTalents.name: Restore Health
cureTalents.description: Cure heals +1d8 more; restoring body also lets you roll a magic skill check to cure an ongoing poison or disease outright.

cureTalents.name: Restore Mind
cureTalents.description: Cure heals +1d8 more; restoring mind also clears confused and dazed.

cureTalents.name: Restore Senses
cureTalents.description: Cure heals +1d8 more; restoring mind also fixes any magical blindness/deafness/lost special senses.

cureTalents.name: Restore Soul
cureTalents.description: Cure heals +1d8 more; restoring soul also cures all ability drain and temporary negative levels.

vitalityTalents.name: Aggressive Vitality
vitalityTalents.description: +2 circumstance bonus on weapon attack and damage rolls.

vitalityTalents.name: Energizing Vitality
vitalityTalents.description: +30 ft. circumstance bonus to all movement speeds.

vitalityTalents.name: Sustaining Vitality
vitalityTalents.description: +4 circumstance bonus to AC and saving throws.
